html:
“Can be placed on dirt ground to change the type of ground.”

-

Rocky Turf is one of the Turf items, acquired by digging Rockyland tiles with a Pitchfork. Like other Turfs, it can be placed on any bare ground tile or it can be used as fuel. Rocky Turf can be crafted and prototyped with 1 Rocks and 1 Flint at Terra Firma Tamper in the Decorations Filter.

Berry Bushes, Saplings, Grass Tufts, Spiky Bushes, Pine Cones, and Birchnuts cannot be planted on Rocky Turf. Eyeplants cannot spawn on this Turf, so it is great for planting Lureplant farms while not spending any more resources than those used to craft the Pitchfork.

When placed on the Surface World and the area is large enough, Crows are the only Birds that will spawn and land on these turfs.

Gallery

  • Rocky Turf texture.
  • Wolfgang standing on some placed Rocky Turf.
  • Rocky Turf as seen on the map.
  • Original HD icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.

Berry Bushes, Saplings, Grass Tufts, Spiky Bushes, Pine Cones, and Birchnuts cannot be planted on Rocky Turf. Eyeplants cannot spawn on this Turf, so it is great for planting Lureplant farms while not spending any more resources than those used to craft the Pitchfork.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Rocky Turf là ​​một trong những vật phẩm Turf, có được bằng cách đào các ô Rockyland bằng Chĩa. Giống như các Đất khác, nó có thể được đặt trên bất kỳ nền đất trống nào hoặc có thể được sử dụng làm nhiên liệu. Đất Đá có thể được chế tạo và tạo nguyên mẫu bằng 1 Đá và 1 Đá lửa tại Terra Firma Tamper trong Bộ lọc Trang trí.

'''Rocky Turf''' is one of the [[Turf]] [[items]], acquired by digging [[Rockyland]] tiles with a [[Pitchfork]]. Like other Turfs, it can be placed on any bare ground tile or it can be used as [[Fire#Fuel|fuel]]. Rocky Turf can be crafted and prototyped with 1 [[Rocks]] and 1 [[Flint]] at [[Terra Firma Tamper]] in the [[Decorations Filter]].

[[Berry Bush]]es, [[Sapling]]s, [[Grass Tuft]]s, [[Spiky Bush]]es, [[Pine Cones]], and [[Birchnut]]s cannot be planted on Rocky Turf. [[Lureplant|Eyeplants]] cannot spawn on this Turf, so it is great for planting [[Lureplant]] farms while not spending any more resources than those used to craft the Pitchfork.

When placed on the [[Surface World]] and the area is large enough, [[Crow]]s are the only Birds that will spawn and land on these turfs.
